reviews.review_msg: Questions are often answered vaguely, which makes it hard to clarify confusion. Overall, students are left to self-teach much of the material. I would not recommend this course unless you are comfortable learning almost entirely on your own.

Assignments and tests don't match what's taught in class, making it feel like you're teaching yourself everything. Office hours aren't very helpful either. If you take this course, be prepared to rely heavily on YouTube and textbooks instead of lectures.
Overall, students are left to self-teach much of the material. I would not recommend this course unless you are comfortable learning almost entirely on your own.
Questions rarely receive clear answers, and overall the course feels largely self-taught. I would not recommend taking this class if you rely on lectures to learn.
Lectures are unclear and poorly organized, with most content read directly from slides and little explanation.
